title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, a regulated financial exchange for real-world event betting founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, spent four years navigating regulatory opposition before achieving a $22 billion valuation. The founders sued a government agency and scaled rapidly after obtaining regulatory approval, building a platform positioned as a prediction market infrastructure rather than gambling.
